topic: Project reality check, council logging, and Zoro next task

picks.oneLine: Planning layers need reconciliation so the board matches the repo.
Council logging exists in JSONL plus the markdown decision log; governance still needs to choose the canonical rule.
Phase B web work is live; the actual game needs the first playable slice next.
Build and PRNG verification are green enough to move from scaffolding to the first real loop.
Zoro should define the player-facing feel of the first trade loop before more office polish.
The real production risk is the missing gameplay loop, not the already-live Dev Lab shell.
Log policy and OpenClaw governance should be clarified while the team pivots toward MVP execution.

summary: Phase B Dev Lab is live, the mobile game is still scaffold-only, council logging exists in JSONL plus markdown, and Zoro's next task is the first playable-slice creative brief.
actions: Update docs/Decision-Log.md with the council outcome
Reconcile roadmap, status, and whiteboard truth
Set Zoro's next task to the first playable-slice creative brief
Keep office mood review as a follow-up, not the top priority
